question_text: Let 𝒪= {𝑃∶𝑃 is a 3 × 3 real matrix satisfying 𝑃𝑇𝑃= 𝐼3 and det(𝑃) = 1}, where 𝐼3 denotes the identity matrix of order 3. Then which of the following options is/are correct?

options.A: There exists a 𝑃∈𝒪 with 𝜆= 2 as an eigen value
options.B: There exists a 𝑃∈𝒪 with 𝜆= 2 as an eigen value
options.C: If 𝜆 is the only real eigen value of 𝑃∈𝒪, then 𝜆= 1
options.D: There exists a 𝑃∈𝒪 with 𝜆= −1 as an eigen value
